findings.issue: Server bind address is derived from config without asserting 127.0.0.1.
findings.fix: Hard-code the bind host to 127.0.0.1; never read it from user config.
findings.why: A 0.0.0.0 bind would expose artefact data on the LAN and break the privacy promise.

findings.issue: Payload read from stdin is not size-bounded.
findings.fix: Cap the read and reject payloads over a sane limit.
findings.why: A runaway agent could write an unbounded file into .hyperflow/.

findings.issue: Unknown artefact type renders a blank panel.
findings.why: Silent blanks read as a bug.
Matches the repo's zero-dependency contract exactly.
